name: Claude Code Workspace
updateContentCommand: if [ -f uigen.zip ]; then unzip -o uigen.zip; fi && if [ -f claude_project/uigen.zip ]; then cd claude_project && unzip -o uigen.zip; fi && cd /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/claude_project && npm run setup
postStartCommand: echo 'Container ready! To start your app, run: cd claude_project && npm run dev'
